title: Spicy Indian-Style Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with the essence of Indian spices, perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: cabbage
ingredients.notes: Use a variety of cabbage with tight leaves

ingredients.name: silky
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with bell peppers or onions

ingredients.name: indian
ingredients.notes: Use store-bought or homemade spice blend

ingredients.name: stir
ingredients.notes: Use a neutral-tasting oil for frying

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the cumin and fry for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced cabbage and silky (or bell peppers/onions) and fry for 3-4 minutes, until slightly tender.
Add the cayenne pepper and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with salt to taste and serve hot.
Garnish with fresh cilantro or scallions, if desired.
